Tankless Water Heater Repair | Chicago, IL

If your bungalow or flat needs Tankless Water Heater Repair in Chicago, IL, contact Plumbers 911 to resolve your issues quickly.

There are many benefits to converting your water heating system to a tankless unit. Tankless models are generally more energy-efficient, require less space and last longer than traditional tanks. However, like any other appliance, they need routine maintenance to continue working at optimal performance. If you’re in need of tankless water heater repair in Chicago, Plumbers 911 provides the resources to get you back on track. Our referral service provides access to highly skilled plumbing professionals in your area. Contact us any time at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) for an immediate response.

 

Why You Might Need Tankless Water Heater Repair

When appropriately sized for your home, tankless water heaters offer a reliable and cost-effective alternative to traditional heating options. They also typically require fewer repairs than storage tank water heaters. Fewer repairs should not be confused with no repairs, however. 

Any type of water heater can require professional assistance to repair problems from time to time. If your system is a tankless gas water heater, dirt can clog its burners over time, causing a drop in the hot water temperature. Gas units also require proper ventilation to release fumes and avoid condensation buildup. Tankless electric water heaters may stop heating water because of a burned-out heating element. 

Both gas and electric systems are subject to corrosion from hard water minerals, creating a drop in water pressure. Plumbers 911’s plumbing professionals are equipped to handle tankless water heater repair in Chicago. We refer highly trained plumbers who are available to evaluate and repair emergency situations 24/7. They also schedule routine maintenance and inspections to avoid service interruptions.

Tankless Water Heater Repair Services in Chicago

If a tankless water heater malfunction has taken you by surprise, Plumbers 911 has a network of professional plumbers who offer the solutions you need to get back on track. We want to ensure you receive the most effective and efficient service possible. 

That’s why we only refer the most experienced, dependable and skilled plumbers available in your area. Our licensed, insured and bonded plumbing contractors can handle any issue involving tankless water heater repair in Chicago. 

They perform time-saving inspections, expediently test systems and make repair recommendations for both gas and electric units. Plumbers referred by our service stay current on the latest techniques and technologies to ensure you receive quality work

If you’re in need of tankless water heater replace or tankless water heater repair, contact Plumbers 911 at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911). We’re available to take your call day or night.

Tankless Water Heater Repair Costs

Tankless water heater repair in Chicago ranges from $200 to $1,200 depending on the issue and brand:

  • Descaling / flushing — $150-$300 (Chicago's hard water makes this essential annually)
  • Igniter / flame rod replacement — $200-$400
  • Heat exchanger repair — $500-$1,200
  • Flow sensor replacement — $200-$400
  • Control board replacement — $400-$800

We service all major brands including Rinnai, Navien, Noritz, Rheem, and Takagi. Call 833-758-6911 for expert tankless water heater service.

Frequently Asked Questions

Why does my tankless water heater keep shutting off?

Common causes include: mineral buildup from Chicago's hard water restricting flow, a dirty air filter, inadequate gas supply, frozen condensate lines in winter, or error codes indicating a specific component failure. Our technicians diagnose the exact issue using the unit's diagnostic codes.

How often should a tankless water heater be serviced?

In the Chicago area, we recommend annual flushing/descaling due to our hard water conditions. Hard water causes mineral buildup that reduces efficiency and can damage the heat exchanger. Regular maintenance extends the life of your unit to 20+ years.

Do you work on all tankless water heater brands?

Yes, our licensed plumbers are experienced with all major brands including Rinnai, Navien, Noritz, Rheem, Takagi, Bosch, and EcoSmart. We stock common parts for faster repairs.
